overall.description: Static shot of a medieval stone tavern or guild hall interior from a fantasy video game. The scene features Gothic architecture with large arched windows, dim firelight illumination, and sparse NPCs gathered around wooden tables. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with cool blue-grey stone tones contrasting warm torchlight.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval Gothic tavern interior with massive stone pillars and arched windows. Sparse NPCs occupy the space - one stands near a barrel on the right while others sit at the central wooden table. The scene is illuminated by warm torchlight against cool stone walls, creating a moody atmosphere typical of fantasy RPG environments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval Gothic tavern interior where warm firelight contrasts with cool stone architecture. It begins by capturing the scale of the room, emphasizing the massive stone pillars and high arched windows that define the space. As the eye settles into the environment, the focus shifts toward the sparse inhabitants, including a figure standing by a barrel on the right and others gathered at a central wooden table. The scene remains poised in this moody stillness, allowing the interplay of torchlight and blue-grey stone to establish a heavy, fantasy RPG atmosphere.
